title: HPRCA Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 149 Junior Engineer Posts
description: The Himachal Pradesh Rajya Chayan Aayog (HPRCA) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 149 Junior Engineer Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their 10th, 12th, Diploma, B.E./B. Tech in Civil Engineering can apply for the HPRCA Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, a...
